name: Thaivivat Insurance Public Company Limited
summary: Thaivivat Insurance Public Company Limited engages in non-life insurance business in Thailand. The company's insurance products include fire, marine and transportation, motor, and personal and travel accident, health, compensation indemnity, critical illness, contractor all risks, burglary, health, and global travel. It also provides reinsurance products. The company was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
